channel.title: DataOps on Oumar Fodé KEBE | Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in DataOps on Oumar Fodé KEBE | Portfolio

item.title: Why your BI dashboards are useless — and how to fix it
item.description: 3,318 sessions analyzed, 279 reports inventoried, 126 active users. The verdict: 10 pages drove 76.7% of all traffic. The rest existed for nothing.

item.title: Why your data projects fail at production
item.description: It’s almost never the code. It’s the organization around the code.
